candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating profit, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and does not appear tied to the selected COGS bucket 'Cost of subcontractors and re-invoiced'. Conservative treatment is to avoid adding it to COGS.
This appears to be an amortisation summary row for intangible assets, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and does not appear linked to the selected COGS row.
Amortisation component under the apparent summary row 'Intangible assets'; not specifically tied to COGS and should not be added to COGS separately.
Amortisation component under the apparent summary row 'Intangible assets'; not specifically tied to COGS and should not be added to COGS separately.
Amortisation component under the apparent summary row 'Intangible assets' in some periods; not specifically tied to COGS and should not be added to COGS separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Cost of subcontractors and re-invoiced'. No explicit COGS-related depreciation/amortisation row is shown. Visible D&A lines look like separate operating overhead items rather than COGS-specific D&A.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating depreciation line at the same level as the selected SG&A buckets and outside 'Personell expenses' and 'Other operating expenses', so it should be added separately to avoid omission.
Appears to be the summary amortisation row for intangible assets; it closely matches the sum of the component amortisation rows beneath it, so prefer this summary row to avoid double counting.
Component of the apparent summary row 'Intangible assets'; do not select if the summary row is used.
Component of the apparent summary row 'Intangible assets'; do not select if the summary row is used.
Component of the apparent summary row 'Intangible assets' in periods where present; do not select if the summary row is used.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Personell expenses' plus 'Other operating expenses'. 'Depreciation fixed assets' and the amortisation summary 'Intangible assets' appear as separate same-level operating rows above operating profit, so they are not obviously embedded in the selected SG&A rows and should be added separately. XRD is empty, so there is no separate R&D line interaction to exclude any amortisation row.
